summary: Creates a sphere mesh with configurable type (primitive, polygon, mesh), radius, and tessellation. A fundamental 3D primitive.

key_params.name: rad
key_params.note: Radius of the sphere (XYZ can be set independently for ellipsoids)

common_gotchas: Primitive type is not renderable with Phong/PBR materials — switch to Polygon or Mesh for standard rendering.
